info.title: Genbox.FastData.Cli
info.description:
A code generator that analyzes your data and creates high-performance, read-only lookup data structures for static data.
      It supports outputting in many different languages (C#, C++, Rust, etc.)

arguments.name: input-file
arguments.description: The file to read data from
